description: discover + validate an existing Dynamo Kubernetes recipe before apply (read-only, no kubectl)
rules: read-only — never runs kubectl or mutates the cluster
must run from inside the ai-dynamo/dynamo repo (recipe_tool resolves the repo root by finding a recipes/ dir beside .git)
validation report (blockers/warnings + interesting lines) is written to record_store
never writes Hugging Face tokens to files or logs
usage: Set RECIPE_TARGET to the recipe directory or deploy.yaml to validate (relative to the Dynamo repo root). Output: validate.json.
limitation: Operates on the existing recipes/ tree only; does not author new manifests. Cluster-mutating apply, smoke tests, and multi-node transport checks are out of scope — use dynamo-router-starter / dynamo-troubleshoot / dynamo-interconnect-check for those.
